migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_integration_connector (connector_id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, target_system VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, notes VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO mes_integration_connector (connector_id, display_name, target_system, status, notes) SELECT 'sap-stub', 'SAP connector placeholder', 'SAP', 'deferred', 'Skeleton row only. Live SAP adapter is BL-169 and not included.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_integration_connector WHERE connector_id = 'sap-stub'); INSERT INTO mes_integration_connector (connector_id, display_name, target_system, status, notes) SELECT '1c-stub', '1C connector placeholder', '1C', 'deferred', 'Skeleton row only. Live 1C adapter is BL-169 and not included.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_integration_connector WHERE connector_id = '1c-stub');

objects.name: mes-integration-catalog-hub
objects.description: BL-225 skeleton hub for connector catalog and Level 4 outbox guidance

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"connectors","sql":"SELECT connector_id, display_name, target_system, status, notes FROM mes_integration_connector ORDER BY connector_id"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${connectors}","fields":{"connectorId":"${item.connector_id}","displayName":"${item.display_name}","targetSystem":"${item.target_system}","status":"${item.status}","notes":"${item.notes}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}
